title: YouTube Analytics: Optimize Performance
description: Learn how to use YouTube Analytics to make smarter content decisions and grow your channel with purpose. This course walks you through interpreting key performance metrics, understanding viewer behavior, and applying data insights to optimize titles, thumbnails, structure, and SEO. You'll explore benchmarking strategies, audience retention analysis, and AI tools that help you refine your content plan over time. Whether you're a creator, marketer, or brand, you'll gain the skills to turn data into growth.
